stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <ProductCard
    name="Studio Headphones"
    category="Audio"
    price="$129"
    imageUrl="/window.svg"
    rating={4.8}
    stockStatus="In stock"
    highlighted={false} />;

stories.name: Highlighted
stories.snippet:
const Highlighted = () => <ProductCard
    name="Studio Headphones"
    category="Audio"
    price="$129"
    imageUrl="/window.svg"
    rating={4.8}
    stockStatus="In stock"
    highlighted />;

stories.name: Sold Out
stories.snippet:
const SoldOut = () => <ProductCard
    name="Studio Headphones"
    category="Audio"
    price="$129"
    imageUrl="/window.svg"
    rating={4.8}
    stockStatus="Sold out"
    highlighted={false} />;

stories.name: Primary
stories.snippet: const Primary = () => <Button variant="primary" size="md" disabled={false} fullWidth={false}>Create playlist</Button>;

stories.name: Secondary
stories.snippet: const Secondary = () => <Button variant="secondary" size="md" disabled={false} fullWidth={false}>Create playlist</Button>;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet: const Disabled = () => <Button variant="primary" size="md" disabled fullWidth={false}>Create playlist</Button>;

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <InputField
    label="Workspace name"
    placeholder="Acme Design"
    helperText="Use the name your team recognizes."
    disabled={false} />;

stories.name: With Error
Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <InputField
    label="Workspace name"
    placeholder="Acme Design"
    helperText="Use the name your team recognizes."
    disabled
    value="Locked workspace" />;
